title: streptanthus glandulosus var. pulchellus
intro: Streptanthus glandulosus var. pulchellus, also known as Pulchellous Towering Tower or more commonly as Towering Tower Cress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, commonly referred to as mustards or cresses. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Streptanthus glandulosus var. pulchellus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
